why_03_body: We are part of the Pomona community — not a chain. Every customer matters and every visit is personal.
why_04_body: Download the AirWallet app and your first wash is on us. App payments are accepted on every machine.

seo_siblings_intro: CleanMax Laundry serves {city} with three connected services. Pick the one that fits — or combine them.
seo_laundromat_intro: Looking for a clean coin laundry or self-service lavandería near {city}, CA? CleanMax Laundry is at 1009 E Holt Ave in Pomona — {desc}. We run 25 Wascomat Clarus Vibe washers (25 lb up to 80 lb for king comforters) and 34 dryers, open daily 6 AM to 10 PM, with coin or AirWallet cashless pay (credit, debit, Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal) and a bilingual Spanish/English attendant on site every open hour.
seo_laundromat_hours: Daily 6 AM – 10 PM (last wash 9 PM). Wash-and-fold same-day cutoff: 3 PM.
seo_laundromat_machines: 25 Wascomat Clarus Vibe washers (2×80 lb, 6×65 lb, 11×40 lb, 6×25 lb) and 34 dryers. 80 lb machines fit king comforters.
seo_laundromat_payment: Coin or AirWallet cashless app — credit/debit, Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal. First wash free when you sign up for AirWallet.
seo_laundromat_city_para: CleanMax Laundry is the go-to coin laundry for customers from {city} and throughout {county} County. Whether you call it a laundromat, coin laundry, or lavandería, our Pomona location is convenient for {city} residents — clean, spacious, well-lit, and deep-cleaned between uses by a bilingual attendant who is on site every hour we are open. Free on-site parking makes runs to the laundromat quick and stress-free.
seo_laundromat_faq_q1: Do you accept credit or debit cards at the laundromat near {city}?
seo_laundromat_faq_a1: Yes — through the AirWallet cashless app. Load your AirWallet balance with any credit or debit card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, or PayPal, then tap to start a washer or dryer. Traditional coin payment also works on every machine.
seo_laundromat_faq_q2: What washer and dryer sizes do you have near {city}?
seo_laundromat_faq_a2: Twenty-five Wascomat Clarus Vibe washers from 25 lb to 80 lb, plus 34 dryers. The 80 lb washers fit king comforters, duvets, and large Airbnb bedding sets — loads a home machine can't handle without stressing the motor.
seo_laundromat_faq_q3: Is an attendant on site at the coin laundry near {city}?
seo_laundromat_faq_a3: Yes. A bilingual Spanish/English CleanMax attendant is on site every hour we are open (6 AM – 10 PM). They help with machines, AirWallet setup, and payment — and they deep-clean every washer and dryer between uses.
seo_laundromat_faq_q4: Is CleanMax a coin laundry or a card laundry?
seo_laundromat_faq_a4: Both. Every washer and dryer accepts coins, and we also accept AirWallet cashless payment (credit, debit, Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal) for customers who prefer to skip the coin slot. Either option — or both — works.
seo_laundromat_faq_q5: Can I wash a king comforter at your {city}-area coin laundry?
seo_laundromat_faq_a5: Yes. Our 80 lb Wascomat Clarus Vibe washers are sized for king comforters, duvets, pet beds, and large bedding sets. Home washers typically can't handle these without stressing the motor — our commercial machines are built for them.
seo_wf_intro: Need wash and fold laundry service — also known regionally as fluff and fold — near {city}, CA? CleanMax Laundry makes laundry day effortless. Drop off at 1009 E Holt Ave in Pomona — {desc} — and we handle the rest: pre-wash stain inspection, premium Sudsy detergent with fabric softener, careful fold, breathable bag. Starting at $1.50 per lb on weekdays. Same-day turnaround if you drop off by 3 PM; next-day otherwise.
seo_wf_step1: Drop off your laundry at our Pomona location (open 6 AM – 10 PM daily). Our bilingual attendant weighs your bag and walks through any special requests.
seo_wf_step2: We do a pre-wash stain inspection, then wash with premium Sudsy detergent and fabric softener (custom detergent on request), dry on the right setting, and fold each piece with care.
seo_wf_step3: Pick up your clean, folded laundry — same-day if you dropped by 3 PM, next-day otherwise. We text you when it's ready.
seo_wf_city_para: We serve {city} customers with the same fluff-and-fold wash service we run for our Pomona neighbors — drop off at 1009 E Holt Ave anytime from 6 AM to 10 PM, including weekends. A bilingual Spanish/English attendant logs your bag, inspects for stains before the wash, runs your load on the right cycle with premium Sudsy and fabric softener, and folds everything into a breathable bag. Customers from {city} and throughout {county} County choose CleanMax for consistent, careful, accountable laundry service.
seo_wf_faq_q1: What time do I need to drop off for same-day wash and fold near {city}?
seo_wf_faq_a1: Drop off by 3 PM on weekdays for same-day pickup. After 3 PM, your order rolls to the next day. Weekend drops follow the same 3 PM cutoff for Sunday-to-Monday turnaround. Same-day weekday pricing is $1.75/lb; next-day weekday is $1.50/lb.
seo_wf_faq_q2: What detergent do you use for wash and fold?
seo_wf_faq_a2: We use premium Sudsy detergent plus fabric softener as our default — it rinses cleanly and works well for most fabrics and skin types. If you need fragrance-free, hypoallergenic, dye-free, or a specific brand, tell us at drop-off and we'll use what you bring or stock for an additional customization on your ticket.
seo_wf_faq_q3: Do you treat stains before washing?
seo_wf_faq_a3: Yes. Every bag gets a pre-wash stain inspection, and we pre-treat fresh stains before the wash cycle. We're honest about old, set-in stains — we'll give it our best shot but can't promise removal on stains that have been through prior wash cycles. Point out any specific spots at drop-off so we know where to focus.
seo_wf_faq_q4: What items can you wash and fold near {city}?
seo_wf_faq_a4: We handle regular clothes, bedding, sheets, comforters (including king — our 80 lb machines are built for them), towels, kids' clothes, activewear, uniforms (restaurant, scrubs, work), tablecloths, and pet beds. We do not accept suits, silk dresses, wedding gowns, leather, suede, fur, down comforters, dry-clean-only items, or heavily soiled items (paint, oil, biohazards). If you bring something in that scope, we'll recommend a local dry cleaner.
seo_wf_faq_q5: Is there a minimum order for wash and fold near {city}?
seo_wf_faq_a5: Yes — a $25 minimum order. For a typical single person that's about one full laundry bag; a family bag clears it easily. No hidden fees beyond the per-pound rate.

seo_commercial_faq_q3: How does commercial laundry pickup and delivery work near {city}?

seo_commercial_faq_q4: Can I get a custom laundry schedule for my business in {city}?

seo_industry_home_city_preface: As Pomona's family-run commercial laundry, we've been handling {industry_lower} loads for our neighbors on E Holt Ave since day one.
seo_industry_process_callout_heading: How Your Laundry Actually Gets Clean
seo_industry_process_callout_body: Every pickup starts with a pre-wash inspection before anything hits a machine — that's how fresh stains get treated and set-in ones get flagged honestly. We wash on premium Sudsy detergent through commercial-grade Wascomat machines up to 80 lb capacity. Our on-site attendant is bilingual Spanish/English and covers every open hour. seo_industry_cta_body: Tell us your cadence and volume and we'll send a per-pound quote within the same business day. Pickup and delivery is always $65 flat per run — the per-pound rate is what we tailor to your operation.

about_p1: CleanMax Laundry is Pomona's newest modern laundromat, designed from the ground up with our customers in mind. Located at 1009 E Holt Ave, we offer clean, safe, and comfortable facilities equipped with the latest Wascomat Clarus Vibe commercial machines — the same equipment used by top laundry operations across the country.
about_p2: We believe everyone deserves access to a laundromat that is genuinely clean, honest about pricing, and welcoming to all. Our facility is bilingual — English and Spanish — and our team is here to help with any questions about self-service laundry, wash and fold drop-off, or commercial laundry service for your business.
about_p3: CleanMax Laundry is locally owned and committed to serving the families and businesses of Pomona and the Inland Empire with dependable service, modern equipment, and a space you will actually want to visit.
about_mission_text: Our mission is simple: make laundry easier. We accomplish that through Wascomat Clarus Vibe equipment that cleans better and faster, honest transparent pricing with no hidden fees, a dependable wash and fold service, and a clean welcoming space that every customer — from busy families to local businesses — can count on.
about_diff_4: Full service: self-service, wash & fold, commercial pickup
about_serve_heading: Proud to Serve Pomona and the Inland Empire
about_serve_text: CleanMax Laundry serves customers from Pomona, Ontario, Chino, Rancho Cucamonga, Upland, Claremont, Diamond Bar, Chino Hills, and the surrounding communities of the Inland Empire. Whether you stop by for a quick self-service wash, drop off laundry for our wash and fold service, or use our commercial pickup and delivery for your business — you are part of the CleanMax community.
blog_subtitle: Helpful guides for Pomona residents and businesses
pickup_h1: Commercial Laundry Pickup and Delivery in Pomona, CA
pickup_intro: CleanMax Laundry offers scheduled commercial laundry pickup and delivery throughout the Pomona Valley and Inland Empire. We collect laundry from your business, wash it at our Pomona facility, and return it — next-day standard on orders under 750 lbs. One family-run team, one flat pickup fee, and a pickup rhythm built around your operation. (Note: pickup is commercial-only; walk-in wash-and-fold drop-off at our Pomona location remains open to all customers any time during open hours.)
pickup_who_intro: Commercial pickup is handled by our own staff — not a third-party driver — and coordinated directly by our family-run team. No sales middleman, no cookie-cutter package.
pickup_value_1_desc: You work with the same people who wash your laundry — not a sales rep. Questions, schedule changes, special handling — one call, one team, one accountable answer.
pickup_value_2_desc: Routes, frequency, handling preferences, and turnaround windows are built around your business — restaurant linens, gym towels, hotel sheets, salon capes. We fit you, not the other way around.
pickup_step1: Submit the interest form on our site, call (909) 248-7305, or email laundry@cleanmaxlaundry.com. Tell us your business type, weekly volume, and location — we reply within one business day with a custom quote.
pickup_step2: A CleanMax team member picks up at your location on your scheduled day. Your laundry is logged, weighed, and brought to our Pomona facility for wash, dry, and fold.
pickup_step3: We deliver it back to your business on the agreed schedule — next-day is standard on orders under 750 lbs, with guaranteed windows available for high-volume accounts.
pickup_area_body: We pick up and deliver for businesses across Pomona, Claremont, La Verne, San Dimas, Diamond Bar, Walnut, Chino, Chino Hills, Ontario, Upland, Rancho Cucamonga, Montclair, Fontana, Rialto, Colton, Riverside, and surrounding communities in LA County, San Bernardino County, and Riverside County. If your business is nearby and you don't see your city listed, call us — we probably cover it.
pickup_pricing_commercial: Pickup and delivery is a flat $65 per run. The per-pound laundry rate is custom-quoted based on weekly volume, type (wash & fold vs linen vs uniforms), and pickup frequency — higher volume and recurring schedules get better rates. Request a free quote and we'll send your specific numbers within one business day.
pickup_faq_q1: How fast is the turnaround for commercial pickup?
pickup_faq_a1: Next-business-day delivery is standard on orders under 750 lbs. Orders over 750 lbs are scheduled on a custom turnaround window we agree on up front. Recurring accounts can lock in guaranteed delivery days as part of their schedule.
pickup_faq_q2: How do I get a commercial pickup quote?
pickup_faq_a2: The fastest path is our free quote form — tell us your business type, approximate weekly volume, and location and we'll reply with custom pricing within one business day. You can also call (909) 248-7305 or email laundry@cleanmaxlaundry.com.
pickup_faq_q3: Does someone need to be present at pickup?
pickup_faq_a3: Usually yes — commercial pickups are coordinated with a staff member at your location so laundry can be logged and any special instructions noted. For regular recurring accounts we can set up pickup points (loading dock, back entrance, laundry closet) that don't require a hand-off.
pickup_faq_q4: What kinds of business laundry do you handle?
pickup_faq_a4: Restaurant linens (tablecloths, napkins, aprons, kitchen towels), gym towels and mats, hotel sheets and bedding, Airbnb turnovers, salon capes and towels, medical office gowns and scrubs, shop uniforms, and more. Our 80-pound Wascomat Clarus Vibe washers handle oversized linen loads easily.
pickup_faq_q5: Is commercial service available in Spanish?
pickup_faq_a5: Sí. We run the business bilingually — English and Spanish — and can text, call, quote, and invoice in whichever language is easier for you. Our on-site attendant is bilingual year-round.
pickup_cta_body: Submit the interest form, call (909) 248-7305, or email laundry@cleanmaxlaundry.com. We reply within one business day with custom pickup, delivery, and per-pound pricing for your business.
comforters_h1: Comforter Washing & Large-Load Laundry in Pomona, CA
comforters_intro: Comforters, duvets, king sheets, mattress toppers, sleeping bags, rugs, and horse blankets — CleanMax Laundry has the large-capacity Wascomat Clarus Vibe machines to handle them clean, fast, and without the damage risk of a home washer that is too small for the job.
comforters_why_heading: Why Not Use a Home Washer?
comforters_why_body: A standard home washer is typically 3–4 cubic feet. A king-size down comforter needs at least 6 cubic feet of drum space to tumble correctly — otherwise, detergent does not rinse out, fill bunches, and the machine can burn out its motor or trip the belt. Our commercial Wascomats run 6 and 8 cubic feet, with a high-speed final spin that gets comforters to the dryer with minimal residual water. That means faster drying, no mildew, and no hot spots from uneven loading.
comforters_what_item_1: Comforters, duvets, and down inserts (queen, king, California king)
comforters_what_item_2: Bedding sets — sheets, pillowcases, shams, bed skirts
comforters_what_item_7: Pet beds and removable pet bed covers
comforters_what_item_8: Heavy curtains and drapes (washable labels only)
comforters_options_heading: Two Ways to Get It Done
comforters_option_self_desc: Bring your comforter in any time 6 AM to 10 PM daily. Use a large Wascomat Clarus Vibe for a single cycle — usually $7–$12 depending on machine size and detergent. Dry it in one of our commercial dryers (about $3–$5). In and out in 90 minutes.
comforters_option_wf_desc: Drop it off and skip the wait. Our team washes, dries, and folds it at $1.50/lb on weekdays, $25 minimum. Most comforters are ready the next business day. Same-day available Monday through Friday.
comforters_care_body: Check the fabric label first — silk, wool, and certain synthetics require dry cleaning and we will tell you if a piece is not a good fit. We use cold-water or warm cycles for most comforters, fragrance-free detergent on request, and low-heat drying for down fills to prevent shrinkage and feather damage. Tell us if you want scented or unscented detergent when you drop off.
comforters_faq_q1: How much does it cost to wash a king comforter?
comforters_faq_a1: Self-service with our large Wascomat is usually $10 to $15 total for a single comforter (wash + dry). Drop-off wash & fold is billed at $1.50/lb — a typical king down comforter weighs 6 to 8 pounds dry, so expect $9 to $12 plus the $25 minimum if it is your only item.
comforters_faq_q2: Can you wash a down comforter without damaging the fill?
comforters_faq_a2: Yes. The key is drum size, detergent type, and drying temperature. Our commercial Wascomats have the drum capacity down fill needs to tumble freely, we use a gentle detergent, and we dry at low heat with clean tennis balls or dryer balls to redistribute the fill as it dries.
comforters_faq_q3: What about a sleeping bag with synthetic fill?
comforters_faq_a3: Synthetic sleeping bags wash easily in our large machines. Zip them up, turn them inside out, wash on a gentle cycle with cold water and mild detergent, then tumble dry on low heat with dryer balls. We can handle it as a drop-off or walk you through the self-service cycle if you prefer.
comforters_faq_q4: How long does it take if I drop it off?
comforters_faq_a4: Next business day on weekday drop-offs before 10 AM. Same-day available for a surcharge. Weekend drop-offs come back Monday or Tuesday. Bulky items with slow drying (down, thick quilts) may take an extra cycle.
comforters_faq_a5: We wash machine-washable rugs and bath mats that fit in our largest Wascomat. We do not wash hand-knotted, wool, or jute rugs — those need a rug cleaning specialist. If you are unsure, bring it in and we will check the label together.
pricing_faq_q1: What is included in the per-pound wash and fold price?
pricing_faq_a1: Detergent, fabric softener, dryer sheets, washing, drying, folding, and packaging in a clean breathable bag are all included in the per-pound rate. No hidden fees. Specific detergent requests (fragrance-free, hypoallergenic, dye-free) are available on request at no extra charge.
pricing_faq_q2: Is there a minimum order for wash and fold?
pricing_faq_a2: Yes, the minimum wash and fold order is $25 (about 17 pounds at the weekday rate). Below that we still accept your laundry, but you will be charged the $25 minimum. Most Pomona households drop off 20 to 40 pounds per visit.
pricing_faq_q3: How fast is same-day wash and fold in Pomona?
pricing_faq_a3: Weekday drop-offs before 10 AM come back the same evening. Drop-offs after 10 AM or on weekends are ready the next business day at standard rates. Same-day pricing is a small surcharge over next-day; see the table above for exact rates.
pricing_faq_q4: Do you wash comforters, bedding, and oversized loads?
pricing_faq_a4: Yes. Our large Wascomat Clarus Vibe machines handle king comforters, duvets, sleeping bags, and heavy bedding that a home washer cannot. Large items are weighed at the same $1.50/lb rate.
quote_faq_q1: How soon will I hear back after requesting a quote?
quote_faq_a1: We respond to commercial quote requests within one business day, usually within a few hours. If you have a tight deadline or need same-day pricing, call (909) 248-7305 directly and we will build your quote on the phone.
quote_faq_q2: What information do you need for an accurate commercial laundry quote?
quote_faq_a2: Business type (restaurant, gym, Airbnb, hotel, salon, medical office, etc.), approximate weekly laundry volume in pounds, pickup address, and any special handling needs (allergen-free, uniform sorting, linen vs terry). The quote form asks for all of this.
quote_faq_q3: Which cities do you service for commercial pickup and delivery?
quote_faq_a3: CleanMax picks up across the Pomona Valley and the Inland Empire: Pomona, Claremont, La Verne, San Dimas, Diamond Bar, Walnut, Chino, Chino Hills, Ontario, Upland, Rancho Cucamonga, Montclair, Fontana, Rialto, Colton, Riverside, and surrounding cities. If your business is nearby but not listed, call us — we likely cover it.
